Clarity.justification: The generated diagram is not visually represented; it is a text-based PlantUML script with no graphical elements. This makes it difficult for stakeholders to understand the architecture without a visual representation.

Completeness.justification: The generated diagram lacks all the components, connections, and information present in the ground truth. It only contains a partial script for one component, 'Tarzan Client,' without any connections or additional components.

Consistency.justification: There is no consistency between the ground truth and the generated diagram as the latter does not visually represent any components or connections. The script does not align with the structure or semantics of the ground truth diagram.
